name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
description: The web application does not sufficiently verify that a well-formed, valid, consistent request was intentionally provided by the user who submitted it, allowing attackers to trick authenticated users into executing unintended state-changing actions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[http_request] node carrying state-changing operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) flows to TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes that modify server state without passing through a CONTROL node that validates a CSRF token, origin header, or same-site cookie policy
